data.body: Patchset 1 CI caught a real regression: test_llm_parity_show_vs_list — to_llm actually passes managed_refs through (not in OMIT_KEYS), so stripping before the llm branch broke show<->list llm parity. Fixed by scoping the strip to the default (non-llm) view only (guard 'fmt != llm'); the reconciler uses the default format + --include-provenance, and the llm view is left intact for parity. Local: lint+mypy green, 897 passed in affected suites incl. the parity test. Patchset 2 pushed; re-awaiting votes.
